/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tactical_battler.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tactical_battler.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tactical_battler.dir/src/render/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tactical_battler.dir/src/render/BuildEditorScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tactical_battler.dir/src/render/ContentPaths.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tactical_battler.dir/src/render/PackManifest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tactical_battler.dir/src/render/SpritePack.cpp.o -o tactical_battler  libtb_core.a _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -lm -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl
